Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 01 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in August 2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI?
The last date to apply online is 21 July 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 21 July 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI?
IBPS Specialist Officer-XVI Online Form 2026 .
tables: IBPS Specialist Officer (IT, Marketing, Law & Other Post) XVI (16tH) Recruitment 2026 Apply Online

Institute of Banking Personal Selection (IBPS)  has released the Recruitment of Common Recruitment Specialist Officer SO in IT Officer, Agriculture Field Officer, Marketing Officer, Law Officer, Rajbasha Adhikari and Other Post in Participating Banks IBPS SO 16th Notification. Any candidate who is interested in this IBPS Specialist Officer SO XVI recruitment 2026  and fulfills the eligibility can Apply Online from 01/07/2026 to 21/07/2026 . For recruitment eligibility, age limit, Post wise Eligibility, selection procedure, syllabus and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.

Institute Of Banking Personal Selection (IBPS) IBPS CRP SPL XVI Specialist Officer 16th Recruitment 2026 IBPS SO 16th Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 01/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 21/07/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 21/07/2026 IBPS SO Pre Exam Date : August 2026 Pre Admit Card Available : Before Exam Pre Result Available : September / October 2026 IBPS SO Mains Exam Date : November 2026 Mains Result Available : November 2026
Application Fee General / EWS / OBC : 850/- SC / ST / PH : 175/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

IBPS Specialist Officer XVI Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2026 Minimum Age : 20 Years Maximum Age : 30 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per IBPS Specialist Officer SO 16th Exam Examination Rules.
IBPS Specialist Officer SO 16th Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : Soon Post

Bachelor Degree with B Level Certificate OR Engineering Degree Computer  Science/  Computer Applications/     Information Technology /     Electronics / Electronics & Telecommunications/Electronics    & Communication/ Electronics & Instrumentation. OR Master Degree.
Bachelor Degree in Engineering with Agriculture OR Equivalent Subject.
Master Degree in Hindi with English as a Subject in Degree Level. OR Master Degree in Sanskrit with Hindi and English as a Subject in Degree Level.
Bachelor Degree in Law 3 Year OR 5 Year. Enrolled with Bar Council.
Master Degree / PG Diploma in Personnel Management / Industrial Relations/ HR / HRD/ Social Work / Labour Law.
Master Degree / PG Diploma in Marketing / PGDBA / PGDBM/ PGPM/ PGDM
